reviews.comment:
Yo se lo digo con  mucho respeto con sinceridad con humildad con honestidad a la gente maravillosa que opina.Para mi opiniГіn todas la Ypf son excelente tienen muy ricos cafГ©.Excelente medialuna muy rica comida te tratran de maravilla y tienen una excelente atenciГіn.Tienen excelente precios y hay todo un poco barato y caro.Espero que les hayan ayudado mucho a la gente maravillosa que opina.Desde ya muchas gracias Sonia Innocente de Tanti рҹҡ•рҹҡ–рҹҡ—рҹҡҳрҹҡҗрҹҡ‘рҹҡ’рҹҡ“рҹҡ”рҹҡҷрҹҡҡрҹҡӣрҹ’ҹрҹ’һрҹ’—рҹ’–рҹ’•рҹ’“рҹ’ңрҹ’ӣрҹ’ҡрҹ’ҷвқӨ

(Translated by Google)
I say this with great respect, sincerity, humility, and honesty to the wonderful people who share their opinions. In my opinion, all YPF stations are excellent. They have delicious coffee, excellent croissants, very tasty food, wonderful service, and excellent customer care. They have excellent prices, with a range of options from inexpensive to more expensive. I hope this has been helpful to the wonderful people who share their opinions. Thank you very much, Sonia Innocente from Tanti рҹҡ•рҹҡ–рҹҡ—рҹҡҳрҹҡҗрҹҡ‘рҹҡ’рҹҡ“рҹҡ”рҹҡҷрҹҡҡрҹҡӣрҹ’ҹрҹ’һрҹ’—рҹ’–рҹ’•рҹ’“рҹ’ңрҹ’ӣрҹ’ҡрҹ’ҷвқӨ
